_profile: macbook-intel-2019-16gb (Intel x86_64 + AMD Radeon Pro dGPU, CPU-first)
_ollama_env_notes: On Intel 2019 MBP, set OLLAMA_NUM_GPU=0 in the LaunchAgent for CPU-only inference. Metal dGPU offload is partial and 4-8GB VRAM is too small for any model at useful context. Bind OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434 for Tailscale access from the main M5 Max.
